principle: Nothing important exists only because a folder exists.

objects.name: Institution
objects.description: Doctrine, governance, institutional identity, and long-term operating principles.

objects.name: Kernel
objects.description: Runtime, permissions, authority, events, executive coordination, and agent orchestration.

objects.name: Memory
objects.description: Graph-based institutional memory and relationship records.

objects.name: Workforce
objects.description: Registered agents, capabilities, authority levels, and future department model.

objects.name: Platform
objects.description: Public website, generated publication assets, and future public interfaces.

objects.name: Audits
objects.description: Structured audit records and ADS export targets.

objects.name: Schemas
objects.description: Machine-readable schemas for institutional and audit records.

objects.name: AI Bootstrap
objects.description: Stable operating doctrine for future AI systems joining the project.

objects.name: Institutional Runtime
objects.description: Living operational state for the institution.

objects.name: Institution Operating System Architecture
objects.description: Architecture of the five-system institutional operating model.

objects.name: Institution Operating System Roadmap
objects.description: Strategic roadmap for institutional operating-system development.

objects.name: Authority Engine
objects.description: Executable resolver for agent capabilities and permission rules.

objects.name: Agent Registry
objects.description: Registered institutional agents, authority levels, commands, and capabilities.

objects.name: Permission Rules
objects.description: Canonical permission rules resolved by the Authority Engine.

objects.name: Authority Levels
objects.description: Institutional authority levels from report-only authority through human approval.
